federal_it.name: Federal IT Services Radar
federal_it.description: Recurring procurement intelligence for small IT, software, cloud, and managed-services vendors selling into the federal market.
federal_it.target_buyer: small federal contractors, subcontractors, capture consultants, and MSPs

federal_cyber.name: Federal Cybersecurity Radar
federal_cyber.description: A tighter watchlist on cybersecurity-adjacent federal spending for vendors chasing defensive, monitoring, and compliance-heavy work.
federal_cyber.target_buyer: cybersecurity firms, MSSPs, compliance consultants, and prime-sub support vendors

federal_health_it.name: Federal Health IT Radar
federal_health_it.description: A recurring brief for vendors and consultants tracking federal health systems, modernization, and digital health spend.
federal_health_it.target_buyer: health IT contractors, digital health integrators, proposal teams, and VA/HHS-focused consultants

federal_cloud_data.name: Federal Cloud & Data Radar
federal_cloud_data.description: Signals for firms chasing federal cloud, platform, data, and managed-services opportunities.
federal_cloud_data.target_buyer: cloud consultancies, data-platform vendors, analytics integrators, and MSPs

federal_construction_it.name: Federal Construction Tech Radar
federal_construction_it.description: Signals for firms sitting between federal construction, facilities, and systems integration spend.
federal_construction_it.target_buyer: construction tech vendors, facilities integrators, and building systems contractors
